title: 1105 The Dynapod - Something Every Prepper Should Have
description:
For a description of the dynapod look at videos 1097 and 1099 - If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
Don't forget that you can buy my books and materials for your own experiments including our conductive inks at https://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/    - and for the many who have asked, yes, you can also donate to further our work, again through the shop.
